response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with over 15 years in the industry and valuable entrepreneurial experience, meeting the minimum qualifications for the role. He also has recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling. However, the position is a Director-level Principal role requiring deep, recognized expertise in AI strategy and experience advising strategic enterprise customers. Bogdan's background is predominantly in full-stack and backend development rather than specialized AI/ML platform strategy, making him a borderline candidate.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience, meeting the minimum tenure requirement.
Strong entrepreneurial background as the Founder of GISCollective, fulfilling a preferred qualification.
Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Lacks the deep, recognized AI/ML expertise and advanced degree (MS/PhD) preferred for this specialized role.
No demonstrated experience operating at a Director-level capacity to advise strategic customers on cloud and AI adoption.
The majority of his career focuses on full-stack web and backend development rather than cutting-edge AI product strategy.
